title: Lively Places Fund
text:
Lively Places Fund - SupportGoWhere
Lively Places Fund
Share link
Provides funding of up to $20,000 for community-driven projects that enhance public spaces and foster community bonds.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Funding of up to $5,000 for small, short-term community projects
Funding of up to $20,000 for eligible larger projects
Traffic redirection support provided for street events
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

The funds awarded will depend on the type and scale of the project. Please refer to the below table for a detailed breakdown:

Category

	

Award Sum

	

Description




Project fund

	

Up to $5,000

	

For smaller, short-term action plans or activities for community bonding in HDB neighbourhoods

e.g. block parties, anti-littering campaign, community recycling day




Building Fund

	

Up to $5,000

	

For projects that will involve a physical transformation of existing public spaces and have an implementation period of 6 months or less

e.g. community arts projects and short-term pop-up installations to activate spaces




Up to $20,000

	

For projects that will involve a physical transformation of existing public spaces and have an implementation period of more than 6 months

e.g. conversion of void decks into community living rooms and cafes, longer-term pop-up installations to activate spaces




Street Closure

	

N/A

	

For short-term projects that transform streets into active public spaces for the community

Support provided will be limited to road closure essentials, consisting of safety barriers, signage and security personnel

Who is this for?

Open to all Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents

Individual or team applicants, with at least 1 applicant above 17 years old

Not for projects already funded by other agencies

Co-funding between agencies may be considered for new projects if the project meets the fund’s objectives

Previous awardees must complete existing projects before reapplying

Cannot support projects that duplicate existing programmes

Does not cover projects or studies started before funding approval

All proposals will be reviewed based on the following criteria:

Fund objective

Level of neighbourhood involvment

Level of community match

Outcomes

Refer to the HDB InfoWEB for more information regarding the criteria.

How to apply?

Please visit https://go.gov.sg/hdb-osglpf-application

Where can I find help?

View more details

View application details 

View your nearest HDB branch here.

Scheme last updated 22 May 2026
